title: Mechanical Trading Station
body:
> Trading Station with Create support.

## [Dedicated wiki](https://wiki.mechanicalmods.net/mods/mechanical-trading-station/)

## Requires Trading station mod
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/trading-station "Modrinth")

## Features
- Kinetic machine, uses rotation to work.
- Jade integration.
- KubeJS support (via base mod)
- Provides `mechanical` trading station type.

## Recipes & KubeJS support
- See [Trading station documentation](https://github.com/oierbravo/trading-station)
